basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 13 June 2026 on the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per the norms of the Government of India/IIT (ISM), Dhanbad.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech/M.S./MCA/M.Sc. with GATE qualification (in CS, DA, EC, or EE) or NET (in Computer Science and Applications, Electronic Science, and Mathematical Sciences)
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech/M.S./MCA/M.Sc. with a GATE qualification (in CS, DA, EC, or EE) or NET (in Computer Science and Applications, Electronic Science, and Mathematical Sciences).

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit Interview via Video Conferencing
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate-I position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 19th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech./M.Tech/M.S./MCA/M.Sc. degree and must have qualified in GATE (in CS, DA, EC, or EE) or NET (in Computer Science and Applications, Electronic Science, and Mathematical Sciences).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit, followed by an interview conducted via video conferencing.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their resume and required documents via email to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-I is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT (ISM) Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand.
